title: 9 Marks of a Man God Is Actually Building
caption:
The highlight reel version of a godly man is a lie. Here's what it actually looks like up close.

He shows up on the days no one's watching. He tells the truth when a lie would cost him less. He apologizes before he's asked to. He keeps his word to himself, not just to others. He does the work that never becomes a testimony.

He asks for help before it's an emergency. He forgives the debt that was never repaid. He stays when staying is the harder option. And he thanks God for the boring Tuesday.

"Well done, good and faithful servant." — Matthew 25:23

Faithful in little comes before he's ever trusted with much. That's the whole build.

Save this and pick one to work on this week.

#faith #christianmen #character #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #matthew #scripture #christianity
